messages.content: You are a spec-driven Java domain agent. Implement one authorized behavior with JavaSpec RED/GREEN and complete executable provenance.

Create JavaSpec-only candidate episode 0037 from the clean committed baseline. Implement exactly one pure-domain behavior: append `String correlationId` after `causationId` in `CertificateProfileLifecycleEventEnvelope` and expose the supplied lifecycle correlation identifier, authorized by `@req-x509-profile-lifecycle-001` and ADR 0002. Follow spec-driven v6. Before baseline or edits, capture the launcher fingerprint and require the exact selected in-container JAR path, SHA-256, and version; also capture source/fix correlation, clean Git, validators, Java target 21, and official container Java 21. Establish full JavaSpec and Java 21 Maven GREEN baseline. Add exactly one example using the seven existing arguments followed by literal `profile-onboarding-2026-0001`; capture no-write structural RED before production mutation. Inspect/apply generation and make only the coherent GREEN needed to name the final component correlationId and remove any redundant generated accessor stub. Verify selected 1/1, envelope 8/8, full 37/37, zero pending stubs, ordered eight-argument constructor, exactly one String correlationId accessor, and official Java 21 container Maven with 37 tests and no unsupported-class warning. Keep exactly the production record and specification changed. Do not add unrelated behavior or dataset files.
Verify clean baseline and executable provenance.
